title: How to apply for a partner visa in Australia (2026 guide)
summary: Applying for a partner visa in Australia can be complex. MinRosh Migration helps applicants understand relationship evidence, documentation, health and character checks, and common reasons partner visa applications are delayed or refused.

title: Student visa Australia requirements explained (2026)
summary: Planning to study in Australia? This guide explains Confirmation of Enrolment, financial capacity, English requirements, processing timelines, and how a student visa can connect to a longer-term migration strategy.

title: Skilled migration Australia points system and invitation trends
summary: While 65 points is the legal minimum for an Expression of Interest, real invitation rounds can require stronger profiles depending on occupation ceilings, English scores, and state nomination opportunities.
